raw_text:
```json
{
  "market_overview": "Bangladesh Water Pump Consumer Personas & Switching Triggers",
  "data_flags": {
    "currency": "BDT (৳)",
    "note": "Pain points and switching triggers are based on observed rural and urban Bangladesh market dynamics. WTP elasticity and specific monetary thresholds are estimates (flagged as '[ESTIMATE]') derived from typical agrarian, aquaculture, and urban consumer behaviors."
  },
  "segments": [
    {
      "segment_name": "FARMER",
      "sub_segments": ["Barind (Dry/Rajshahi)", "Haor (Flash Flood/Sylhet)", "Coastal (Salinity/Khulna/Barishal)"],
      "persona_description": "Small to marginal farmer relying on groundwater or surface water for irrigation. Highly sensitive to upfront costs and diesel prices.",
      "decision_hierarchy": [
        "Village Dealer Recommendation (High trust, often provides credit)",
        "IDCOL Subsidy Eligibility (Determines affordability for solar pumps)",
        "BADC/BMDA Programs (Reliance on government backed infrastructure)",
        "Upfront Price & Fuel Type (Diesel vs. Electric)"
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Voltage spikes and low voltage frequently burn out electric motors",
        "Spare parts take weeks to arrive, missing critical planting/harvest windows",
        "Rising diesel costs severely squeezing profit margins",
        "Flooding (Haor) or salinity (Coastal) degrading pump casings prematurely"
      ],
      "switching_triggers": [
        "Repeated motor burnout due to bad local electricity grid",
        "Dealer offers a better credit/instalment plan for a competing brand",
        "Introduction of an IDCOL subsidized solar pump alternative",
        "Neighboring farmer demonstrates higher water yield/lower cost with a new brand"
      ],
      "wtp_elasticity": "High",
      "wtp_details": {
        "range": "৳8,000 - ৳25,000",
        "cash_flow": "Seasonal (Post-harvest lump sums)",
        "elasticity_rationale": "[ESTIMATE] Highly elastic. A ৳2,000 price difference or the availability of zero-interest credit will almost guarantee a brand switch. Brand loyalty is low unless tied to BADC/BMDA programs."
      }
    },
    {
      "segment_name": "FISH FARMER",
      "sub_segments": ["Haor (Open water/Enclosed)", "Coastal (Shrimp/White fish - Khulna/Cox's Bazar)"],
      "persona_description": "Commercial aquaculture operator managing ponds or enclosed water bodies. Treats the pump as a critical life-support system for stock.",
      "decision_hierarchy": [
        "Continuous Operation Reliability (24/7 duty cycle during critical seasons)",
        "Salinity/Corrosion Resistance (Material build quality)",
        "After-sales support speed (Must be fixed within hours, not days)",
        "Total Cost of Ownership vs. Upfront Price"
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Pump failure during heatwaves or at night leads to massive fish kill (total stock loss)",
        "Corrosion from brackish/coastal water degrades impellers and housings",
        "Power outages requiring seamless switch to backup generators",
        "Clogging from algae and organic matter in pond water"
      ],
      "switching_triggers": [
        "A single catastrophic fish kill event traced to pump failure",
        "Corrosion of metal parts within the first 1-2 years (seeking stainless/cast iron alternatives)",
        "Competitor brand offers a guaranteed 4-hour emergency response SLA",
        "Availability of heavy-duty, corrosion-resistant submersibles at a comparable price"
      ],
      "wtp_elasticity": "Medium",
      "wtp_details": {
        "range": "৳15,000 - ৳40,000",
        "cash_flow": "Premium for reliability; cash flow tied to harvest cycles",
        "elasticity_rationale": "[ESTIMATE] Moderately elastic. Willing to pay a 20-30% premium over standard agricultural pumps for proven reliability and anti-corrosion materials, but price sensitivity increases for farms over ৳30,000."
      }
    },
    {
      "segment_name": "URBAN HOMEOWNER",
      "sub_segments": ["Dhaka (Apartments/Individual Homes)", "Chittagong (Hilly terrain/Coastal)"],
      "persona_description": "Middle-class to affluent urban resident or REHAB apartment developer needing consistent water pressure and quiet operation.",
      "decision_hierarchy": [
        "Apartment Builder/Real Estate Spec (For new builds)",
        "Brand Trust & Online Reviews (Walton, Singer, Grundfos, etc.)",
        "Noise Level & Aesthetics",
        "Pressure Consistency during peak morning/evening hours"
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Loud vibrating noise disrupting sleep and daily life",
        "Pressure drops during peak morning usage hours",
        "Lack of reliable technicians for after-sales servicing",
        "Energy inefficiency leading to high electricity bills"
      ],
      "switching_triggers": [
        "Persistent noise complaints from family members or tenants",
        "Moving to a new apartment/building (fresh purchase decision)",
        "Seeing targeted digital ads or YouTube reviews for quieter, smart inverter pumps",
        "Experiencing a complete motor failure and deciding to upgrade rather than repair"
      ],
      "wtp_elasticity": "Low",
      "wtp_details": {
        "range": "৳5,000 - ৳15,000 (Booster), ৳15,000 - ৳35,000 (Building System)",
        "cash_flow": "Steady monthly income",
        "elasticity_rationale": "[ESTIMATE] Inelastic. Brand trust and low noise are the primary drivers. Consumers will easily pay a ৳3,000-৳5,000 premium for a recognized brand that promises a 'maintenance-free' and quiet experience."
      }
    },
    {
      "segment_name": "MUNICIPAL/INDUSTRIAL",
      "sub_segments": ["City Corporations (WASA/City Corp)", "Textile & Garments (Dyeing/Washing)", "Pharmaceutical (Purification/Cooling)"],
      "persona_description": "B2B/Government procurement officers or factory maintenance heads managing large-scale, continuous water supply or effluent treatment.",
      "decision_hierarchy": [
        "Tender Specifications & Compliance (BSTI certification mandatory)",
        "Service Level Agreement (SLA) & Guaranteed Uptime",
        "Total Cost of Ownership (Energy efficiency + Maintenance)",
        "Relationship with OEM/Distributor"
      ],
      "pain_points": [
        "Downtime costing thousands of dollars per hour in ruined textile batches or pharma batches",
        "Counterfeit spare parts entering the factory supply chain",
        "High energy consumption eating into factory operating margins",
        "Complex import lead times for specialized industrial pumps"
      ],
      "switching_triggers": [
        "Failure to meet tender SLAs resulting in financial penalties",
        "Discovery of counterfeit parts from the current distributor",
        "OEM offers an attractive energy-efficiency retrofit (e.g., VFD-integrated pumps)",
        "End of lifecycle for existing heavy infrastructure"
      ],
      "wtp_elasticity": "Low",
      "wtp_details": {
        "range": "৳50,000 - ৳500,000+",
        "cash_flow": "Corporate/Govt budgets, CAPEX/OPEX cycles",
        "elasticity_rationale": "[ESTIMATE] Highly inelastic. Price is secondary to compliance (BSTI), uptime, and OEM reliability. Willing to pay top-tier pricing provided there is a bulletproof guarantee on spare part authenticity and rapid technical support."
      }
    }
  ]
}
```
